mechanism_narrative: An elevated FEDFUNDS level above the historical restrictive threshold raises the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, compressing valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 5.06% as of 2023-05-01 vintage, near cycle high
failure_condition: If SPX 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of sessions with FEDFUNDS above 5% over any rolling 2-year window, or Rank IC stays below 0.03, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: A Sahm-rule-like rise in UNRATE of at least 0.3 percentage points above its trailing 12-month low signals recession onset, causing equity markets to price in earnings deterioration and produce negative 20-day forward returns.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises >= 0.3pp above its trailing 12-month minimum
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE=3.7% vintage vs 3.6% revised, near cycle lows as of 2023-05-01
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion transitioning toward recession risk
failure_condition: If forward 20-day returns following the trigger are positive with statistical significance (p>0.10 for negative mean) across the walk-forward test set, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: When the real policy rate, computed as FEDFUNDS minus trailing 12-month CPIAUCSL inflation, exceeds 2.0%, restrictive real financial conditions jointly signaled by both series suppress corporate investment and equity valuations, producing negative 60-day forward S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: Real policy rate (FEDFUNDS minus trailing 12-month CPIAUCSL inflation) exceeds 2.0%
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS=5.06% and CPIAUCSL YoY inflation moderating from peak as of 2023-05-01
failure_condition: If 60-day forward returns conditional on real rate > 2% are not significantly lower than unconditional baseline returns (t-test p > 0.10) over a 3-year rolling window, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: Positive month-over-month growth in RSAFS reflects resilient consumer spending, which supports near-term corporate revenue expectations and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the following 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value 686,573M vs revised 673,902M as of 2023-05-01
failure_condition: If Rank IC between RSAFS monthly growth and 5-day forward SPX returns is below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: A deceleration in INDPRO growth during a late-cycle expansion phase signals impending margin compression and slowing industrial output, leading to negative 60-day forward S&P 500 returns; the same deceleration during an early-cycle recovery does not carry this bearish signal.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage 103.0107 vs revised 100.9286 as of 2023-05-01, indicating downward revision pressure
failure_condition: If negative INDPRO growth episodes during late-cycle regimes are followed by non-negative mean 60-day forward returns with p>0.10, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: When 3-month annualized PAYEMS growth falls below 100,000 jobs per month, weakening labor demand signals slowing consumer income growth and corporate hiring caution, producing negative 20-day forward S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: 3-month annualized PAYEMS growth falls below 100,000 jobs/month
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage 156,105K vs revised 155,655K as of 2023-05-01
failure_condition: If SPX 20-day forward returns following the trigger show positive mean with p<0.05 significance across the test window, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS exceeds a neutral-rate proxy while UNRATE simultaneously remains below 4%, the joint signal of restrictive policy amid a still-tight labor market indicates an overheating economy at risk of a hard landing, producing negative 60-day forward S&P 500 returns.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS=5.06% and UNRATE=3.7% as of 2023-05-01, jointly indicating tight labor market amid restrictive policy
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with tight labor market
failure_condition: If 60-day forward returns under the joint trigger condition are not significantly below unconditional baseline (t-test p>0.10) over a 3-year rolling walk-forward window, reject the hypothesis.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month acceleration in INDPRO signals rising industrial output momentum, which supports near-term corporate earnings expectations and drives positive S&P 500 returns over the following 5 trading days.
failure_condition: If Rank IC between INDPRO month-over-month change and 5-day forward SPX returns falls below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, reject the hypothesis.
